# HDR20 (4D Radar) SDK Python Sample - Requirements
# NOTE: PySide6 requires 64-bit Python (x64). 32-bit Python is NOT supported.
#       Use 64-bit DLL (output/64bit/) with 64-bit Python for GUI.
#       For 32-bit DLL testing, use hdr20_radar.py (no GUI, no PySide6 needed).
#
# Licenses:
#   PySide6   - LGPL v3
#   pyqtgraph - MIT
#   PyOpenGL  - BSD
#   numpy     - BSD

PySide6
pyqtgraph
PyOpenGL
numpy
